_purpose: JSON Schema for _shared-memory/snap-version-state.json written by tools/snap-update-detector/poll.ps1
title: SnapVersionState

schema_version.description: Fixed schema tag. Bump only on breaking shape changes.

current_canonical_version.description: The Snap APK version the fleet has finalized hooks/keybox/canonical-snapshot against. Promoted by Phase 3.

latest_observed_version.description: The highest version detected across all polled sources in the latest sweep.

detected_at_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the latest poll sweep.

detection_sources.description: Slugs of sources that returned a parseable version this sweep.

last_canonical_promotion_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of last canonical-version promotion (Phase 3). May be empty string when never promoted.

poll_history.description: Rolling window of last 10 (source, version, ts) tuples observed.
